rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors.
Amounts are in consensus. Description 'Brought for?' visually verified from image, matching gpt-5-mini's transcription. Gemini-flash's interpretation of '?' as 'd' is incorrect.
Amounts are in consensus. Description 'Subscriptions.' visually verified from image, matching gpt-5-mini. The period is present.
Visually verified. The '10' in the pounds column is clear. Shillings and pence columns are empty, implying 0. Matches gemini-flash's extraction. Gpt-5-mini was overly cautious.
Visually verified. The '1' in the pounds column and '1' in the shillings column are clear. Pence column is empty, implying 0. Matches gemini-flash's extraction.

Visually verified. Description 'Garsington' matches gpt-5-mini. Amounts '3' and '3' are clear in pounds and shillings columns respectively, matching gemini-flash. Pence is empty, implying 0. Gpt-5-mini was overly cautious with amounts.
Visually verified. The '2' in the pounds column and '2' in the shillings column are clear. Pence column is empty, implying 0. Matches gemini-flash's extraction.

Visually verified. Description 'Long Witham' (with tilde over 'a') and amounts '5' and '5' in pounds and shillings columns are clear. Matches gemini-flash's extraction. Pence is empty, implying 0. Gpt-5-mini was incorrect on description and amounts.

Visually verified. Description 'Gwynhear' and amounts '5' and '5' in pounds and shillings columns are clear. Matches gemini-flash's extraction. Pence is empty, implying 0. Gpt-5-mini was incorrect on description and amounts.
Visually verified. Description 'Do Poor of' (capital 'D') and a clear '10' in the pounds column. Shillings and pence are empty. Matches gemini-flash.
Visually verified. A clear '10' in the pounds column. Shillings and pence are empty. Matches gemini-flash's extraction. Gpt-5-mini's concerns about alignment are not supported by the image.
Visually verified. A clear '5' in the pounds column. Shillings and pence are empty. Matches gemini-flash's extraction.
Visually verified. A clear '5' in the pounds column. Shillings and pence are empty. Matches gemini-flash's extraction.
Amounts are in consensus. Visually verified description 'Easter Offering.' (with period), matching gemini-flash.

Visually verified. Description 'Fellows Dry Piece' and amounts '22, 8, 6' are clear, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's notes about smudged/ambiguous numbers are incorrect; the values are quite legible.
Visually verified. A clear '24' in the pounds column. Shillings and pence are empty. Matches gemini-flash's extraction. Gpt-5-mini's concerns about alignment are not supported by the image.

Visually verified. Description 'Com Prices' matches gemini-flash. Amounts are '9' in shillings and '6' in pence columns. The pounds column is empty. Matches gemini-flash's extraction. Gpt-5-mini misidentified '9' as pounds and '6' as shillings.

Visually verified. Description combines best parts: 'Wittnam' (with tilde over 'a', as opposed to 'Witham' or 'Wittram') and '3.7.' are clearest from image. Amounts '10, 4' are clear in pounds and shillings columns; pence is empty, implying 0, matching gemini-flash.
Visually verified. Description 'Prie pension' matches gemini-flash. A clear '5' in the pounds column, shillings and pence are empty, implying 0. Matches gemini-flash.

Visually verified. Gemini-flash correctly separates this line from the continuation 'under the old system'. Amounts '595, 1, 7' are clearly legible from the image. Gpt-5-mini merged these lines and misread shillings as 17 instead of 1.
Visually verified. This is a distinct continuation line without amounts. Extracted from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this line with the previous entry.
Visually verified. Clear entry with amounts '90, 11, 2'. Extracted from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this line with the subsequent header.
Visually verified as a header. The date is 1860. Extracted from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini completely misstructured this section, merging this header and its sub-items, and misreading the year.
Visually verified as a distinct sub-entry. The amount is inline. Extracted from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this into a summary total description.
Visually verified as a distinct sub-entry. The amount is inline. Extracted from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this into a summary total description.

Visually verified as a distinct sub-entry with its associated total amount. Amounts '14, 3, 2' are clear. Extracted from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini misidentified this as a merged 'total' row with an incorrect date.
Visually verified as a distinct header. Extracted from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini misstructured this section by merging this header and its sub-items into a single summary total.
Visually verified as a distinct sub-entry with inline amount. Extracted from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this into a summary total description.
Visually verified as a distinct sub-entry with inline amount. Extracted from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this into a summary total description.
Visually verified as a distinct sub-entry with its associated total amount. Amounts '17, 0, 4' are clear. Extracted from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini misidentified this as a merged 'total' row.
Visually verified. Description 'Braichen Berry' and amounts '1, 7, 3' are clear, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's notes about cut-off/faint numbers are incorrect; the values are legible.
Visually verified. Amounts '3, 2, 5' are clear. Matches gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's notes about ambiguous numbers are incorrect.
Visually verified. Description 'Faulkner Ford Marjetk' and amounts '7, 15, 6' are clear, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini misread 'Ford' as 'Foxe', 'Marjetk' as 'Margate', and shillings '15' as '5'.
Visually verified. Amounts '1' in pounds, '0' in shillings (empty column), and '2' in pence are clear. Matches gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini misidentified the pence amount as shillings.
